channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jazz cruise to rare blowout win over Portland, 141-99
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an extremely difficult rebuilding year, the Utah Jazz will relish nights like this one.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 24 Army wins AAC championship in first attempt as Daily runs for 4 TDs in 35-14 win over Tulane
item.description: Bryson Daily rushed for four touchdowns to tie the American Athletic Conference championship game record, and No. 24 Army completed a perfect first season in the league by beating Tulane 35-14.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jacob Trouba isn't pleased with the Rangers' handling of his departure in a trade with Anaheim
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Jacob Trouba is finally out of New York after months of public trade rumors and private threats from the Rangers, who were determined to get rid of their captain and his massive contract.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Golden State Valkyries build roster by taking 11 players in expansion draft, including Kate Martin
item.description: The Golden State Valkyries have selected center Iliana Rupert of Atlanta, guard Veronica Burton of Connecticut, guard Carla Leite of Dallas and forward Maria Conde of Chicago with their initial picks of the WNBA expansion draft.
item.dc:creator: Janie Mccauley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dan Campbell acknowledges Lions' Dan Skipper as he vomits during impassioned postgame victory speech
item.description: The Detroit Lions are heading back to the playoffs. A win over the Packers was Detroit's 12th of the season and punched their ticket to the postseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff makes MLW debut and makes major impact
item.description: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff made his Major League Wrestling debut on Thursday night, forming matches, confronting wrestlers and even firing someone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Cy Young winner Shane Bieber returning to Cleveland Guardians on 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Shane Bieber is returning to the Cleveland Guardians after making just two starts and undergoing Tommy John surgery last season, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Texas has nation's top recruiting class after landing elite defensive lineman from Georgia
item.description: One day before Texas and Georgia face off in the Southeastern Conference championship game, the Longhorns earned a surprising victory over the Bulldogs on the recruiting trail.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Jones' mom wanted Vikings star benched over recent ball security issues
item.description: Minnesota Vikings running back Aaron Jones said his mom was not pleased with his performance in Sunday's win over the Arizona Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Will Juan Soto top Shohei Ohtani's deal? In the era of deferred money, it might depend on the math
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Deciding whether Juan Soto tops Shohei Ohtani for baseball’s largest contract could be in the eye of the beholder because of all the deferred money in Ohtani's deal.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Providence College AD apologizes for offensive religious chant toward BYU basketball team
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4) -- The athletic director at Providence College -- an East Coast catholic university -- apologized to Brigham Young University on social media for offensive chants made by the student section during Tuesday's men's basketball game.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, ABC 4

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cougars go cold in 83-64 loss at Providence
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team suffered its worst shooting performance of the season and lost at Providence Tuesday night, 83-64 to fall to 6-2 on the season. The Cougars shot just 33.3 percent from the field in scoring a season-low 64 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lincoln's big win, two-way tie lead exciting Gala Awards
item.description: An incredible year for Lincoln quarterback Akili Smith Jr. continued inside the Rock Church Tuesday when he became the second Hornet to win the Silver Pigskin trophy in its 26-year history.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Matthews scores first goal since return from injury, Maple Leafs beat Blackhawks 4-1
item.description: Auston Matthews scored his first goal since returning from injury as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Michigan seeking to play Northwestern at Soldier Field in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — College football season is over for Northwestern University, but that hasn't stopped higher-ups in the administration from weighing venue options for one of its high profile matchups in 2025. According to rg.org's Paul M.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: CU Buffs await bowl selection
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Buffaloes won't be heading to the Big 12 title game, but they're still sitting comfortably in the AP Top 25 at No. 20. With nine wins, including seven in conference play, it's a season most Buffs fans would call a success. Now, it's a waiting game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mitchell scores 35, Cavs end Celtics' winning streak with 115-111 win in matchup of East's elite
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 20 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter as the Cleveland Cavaliers ended Boston's seven-game winning streak with a 115-111 victory over the Celtics on Sunday night in the second intense matchup between the Eastern Conference’s top teams this season.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 6 Chicagoland prep football programs bring home IHSA state championships over the weekend in Normal
item.description: Six Chicagoland prep football programs, including two from the city, claimed Illinois High School Association state championships over Thanksgiving weekend in Normal.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
